statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input a list of integers and return the sum of their square roots.
statement.outputFormat: A single integer representing the sum of the square roots.
statement.notes: Assume the input list is not empty and does not contain any non-integer values.

hints.text: Use the sqrt function from math library.

editorial.title: Finding the Sum of Square Roots
editorial.intuition: The problem is to find the sum of the square roots of the elements in the array.
editorial.bruteForce: We can find the square root of each element and add them to get the final result.
editorial.optimalSolution: We can use the math library to find the square root of each number.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The proof of correctness is simple: we are correctly finding the sum of square roots.
editorial.dryRun: An example dry run would be to find the square roots of the elements in the array and add them to get the final result.
commonMistakes: Not adding the square roots correctly
